docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: TOLPEN, FARLEY STEPHEN SUBSTITUTED FOR CHOLAKIAN, KEVIN KAY AS ATTORNEY FOR MCMURDO, JOHN
ORDER GRANTING PETITION TO PERMIT LATE CLAIM
PETITION FILED BY PETITIONER MCMURDO, JOHN AS TO RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DECLARATION OF JOHN MCMURDO IN SUPPORT OF PETITION FOR ORDER PERMITTING LATE CLAIM AGAINST GOVERNMENTAL AGENCY FILED BY PETITIONER MCMURDO, JOHN
MOTION NOTICE OF HEARING OF PETITION FOR ORDER TO PERMIT LATE CLAIM, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER MCMURDO, JOHN HEARING SET FOR OCT-16-2003 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
NOTICE OF NON-OPPOSITION TO PETITION FOR ORDER TO PERMIT LATE CLAIM FILED BY DEFT

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PETITIONER JOHN MCMURDO'S PETITION FOR ORDER TO PERMIT LATE CLAIM -- GRANTED -- NON-OPPOSITION FILED ON 10/6/03. ORDER WAS SUBMITTED AFTER THE HEARING BY COLIN H. JEWELL, ESQ., COUNSEL FOR PETITIONER, AND SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. REPORTER: ROBERT BALIAN, CSR #5220
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-16-2003 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PETITIONER JOHN MCMURDO'S Petition For Order To Permit Late Claim -- Granted -- non-opposition filed on 10/6/03. ORDER was submitted after the hearing by Colin H. Jewell, Esq., counsel for petitioner, and SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (PHA/301/JU) Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR #5220
